channel.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
GitHub Actions

  • setup-dlangstars33 - Install D compilers & DUB inside GitHub Actions
  • dub-upgradestars1 - Run dub upgrade trying to repeat on network failure and using package cache on GitHub Actions

    • Testing Frameworks

  • silly - Better test runner for the D programming language. No nonsense.
  • dunitstars62 - Advanced unit testing & mocking toolkit
  • unit-threadedstars113 - Multi-threaded unit test framework

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Data serialization

XML

  • arsd dom.d - an xml/html DOM based on what Javascript provides in browsers

    • Game Bindings

  • BindBC libraries - -betterC compatible, @nogc bindings using bindbc-loaderstars24:
    • OpenGL - bindbc-openglstars29
    • GLFW 3 - bindbc-glfwstars29
    • SDL 2 - bindbc-sdlstars50
    • SDL2_gfx - bindbc-sdlgfxstars1
    • SFML 2 - bindbc-sfmlstars3
    • Imgui - immediate UI - bindbc-imguistars1
    • Nuklear - immediate UI - bindbc-nuklearstars35
    • raylib - bindbc-raylibstars11
    • bgfx - bindbc-bgfxstars15
    • WegGPU - bindbc-wgpustars8
    • Zstandard - compression - bindbc-zstandardstars2
    • nanomsg-next-gen - bindbc-nngstars1
    • OpenAL - audio engine - bindbc-openalstars5
    • SoLoud - audio engine - bindbc-soloudstars5
    • KiWi - widget library - bindbc-kiwistars4
    • NanoVG - vector drawing engine - bindbc-nanovgstars3
    • Blend2D - 2D Vector Graphics Powered by a JIT Compiler - bindbc-blend2dstars3
    • Lua - bindbc-luastars8
    • JoyShockLibrary - bindbc-jslstars2
    • Newton Dynamics - physics engine - bindbc-newtonstars6
    • FreeImage - bindbc-freeimagestars4
    • Assimp5 - bindbc-assimpstars5
    • Freetype - bindbc-freetypestars8
    • Harfbuzz - text shaping engine - bindbc-harfbuzzstars1

    • Internationalization

  • bindbc-icustars1 - bindbc bindings for the unicode ICU library.

    • Machine Learning

  • bindbc-onnxruntimestars2 - bindbc bindings to Microsoft's cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator

    • Scientific

    Language Processing

  • bindbc-mecabstars1 - bindbc MeCab binding (Part-of-Speech and Morphological Analyzer for Japanese)

    • IDEs & Editors

  • Mono-Dstars111 - A D language addon for MonoDevelop. With dub support.
  • IntelliJ D Language - Support for the D programming language within IntelliJ IDEA.
  • code-d [open-vsx] - Visual Studio Code extension using serve-d
  • ide-d - Atom extension for D using serve-d
  • Dexed - IDE for the D programming language, its compilers, tools and libraries.

    • OS

  • PowerNexstars465 - A kernel written in D
  • Trinixstars89 - Hybrid operating system for x64 PC written in D

    • Game Frameworks

  • Dashstars410 - A free and open 3D game engine written in D. see https://circularstudios.com/dash/.
  • rengfxstars41 - lightweight, expressive, extensible 2D/3D game engine.

    • Official Website

  • dlang.org - Official website for D.
  • wiki.dlang.org - Official Wiki for D.
  • code.dlang.org - Offical Library/Module Registry for D.
  • forum.dlang.org - Official forum. Many interesting discussions occurring on a daily basis.
  • Language Specification - D programming language specification.

    • People

  • Walter Bright - Father of D. Walter Bright is the creator and first implementer of the D programming language and has implemented compilers for several other languages.
  • Andrei Alexandrescu, PhD - C++ guru. Author of The D Programming Language and Modern C++ Design. With Walter Bright, Andrei co-designed many important features of D and authored a large part of D's standard library. Andrei works as a trainer in advanced C++ programming and algorithms and is now actively evangelizing D in the organization.

    • Events

  • DConf - the premier event where D luminaries exchange knowledge, insight, and inspiration on everything related to the D language and its ecosystem.

    • Organizations

  • Symmetry Investments - Symmetry Investments LP is an investment management company with approximately US$4.7 billion in assets under management as of 31 December 2018. Main sponsor of the Symmetry Autumn of Code. Have sponsored the development of excel-d, dppstars191, autowrapstars66, mir-algorithmstars146, and various other projects.

    • Books

  • TDPL - The D Programming Language by Andrei Alexandrescu.
  • Programming in D - A very detailed book about programming in D by Ali Çehreli covering many areas of the language. Has a free online version and is suitable for beginners.
  • D Cookbook - A recipe-packed reference guide filled with practical tasks that are concisely explained to develop and broaden the user's abilities with the D programming language. by Adam D. Ruppe. Here is an interesting review of the book.
  • Learning D - This book is intended for those with some background in a C-family language who want to learn how to apply their knowledge and experience to D. (...) This book will help you get up to speed with the language and avoid common pitfalls that arise when translating C-family experience to D.
  • D Web Development - Whether you are new to the world of D, or already have developed applications in D, or if you want to leverage the power of D for web development, then this book is ideal for you.

    • Tutorials

  • Pragmatic D tutorial - This is a pragmatic introduction to the D Programming Language. by Andreas Zwinkau.
  • Component programming in D - An article written by Walter Bright that details how D's functional support leads to a flexible and beautiful component programming style.
  • Component programming with ranges - A detailed blog post about how to do component programming in a idiomatic D way with ranges, with a full working example.
  • Functional image processing in D - A very interesting tutorial about writing an image processing lib in D. Shows the power of D's templates/CTFE/Ranges/UFCS for functional style programming.
  • Creating a simple JSON serialiser in D - D metaprogramming tutorial series

    • Tutorials

    Bare metal / kernel development

  • D Bare bones - kernel hello world in D (using GDC compiler)
  • D barebone with ldc2 - another kernel hello world in D (using LDC compiler)
  • XOmB bare bones - an exokernel operating system written in D. Main page, github.
  • Bare Metal ARM Cortex-M GDC Cross Compiler - building a bare metal ARM Cortex-M (arm-none-eabi) GDC cross compiler for a Linux host.

    • Blogs

  • This week in D - A weekly overview of activity in the D community and brief advice columns to help you get the most out of the D Programming Language.
  • D Idioms - A great blog for many useful idioms with D programming.
  • GTK-D coding - Simple examples of how to use GtkD to build GUI applications.
  • Tasty D - A blog about learning the D programming language and various D language trivia.

    • Articles

  • Purity in D - An article that explains the design principles behind D's purity feature.
  • D is for Data Science - A great post about how D is suitable for data science, particularly, replacing the role of python scripts for fast prototyping.

    • Package Management

  • code.dlang.org - Official D library repository. Backed by dub.

    • Compilers

  • sdcstars166 - The Stupid D Compiler. Written in D. Grows Smarter every day.

    • Build Tools

  • scons-d - Scons has built-in support for building D projects, thanks to Russel Winder.
  • button - A universal build system to build your software at the push of a button.
  • wildstars7 - Wild build system, used to build the PowerNexstars465 kernel

    • Lexers, Parsers, Parser Generators

  • libdparsestars92 - A D language lexer and parser, (possibly) future standard D parser/lexer.

    • Containers

  • EMSI containersstars111 - Containers that do not use the GC

    • Data serialization

    JSON

  • vibe.data.json - JSON functions in Vibe.d. Currently the best implementation I used.
  • std.json - D's standard library JSON module. Needs refinement.
  • std.data.jsonstars25 - Phobos candidate for JSON serialization (based on Vibed)
  • asdfstars11 - Cache oriented string based JSON representation for fast read & writes and serialisation.

    • Database clients

  • vibe.dstars1k - Vibe.d has internal support for Redis and MongoDB, which are very stable. Soon, the database drivers will be separated into independent projects.

    • Command Line

  • d-colorize - A port of the ruby library colorizestars1.1k. It add some methods to set color, background color and text effect on console easier using ANSI escape sequences.
  • commandrstars33 - A modern, powerful commmand line argument parser.

    • GUI Libs

  • Sciter-Dportstars30 - D bindings for the Sciter - crossplatform HTML/CSS/script desktop UI toolkit.

    • Logging

  • dloggstars16 - Logging for concurrent applications and daemons with lazy and delayed logging, logrotate support.

    • Configuration

  • D:YAMLstars102 - YAML parser and emitter for the D programming language.

    • Blog Engine

  • moodstars43 - simple vibe.d based blog engine

    • Image Processing

  • opencvdstars15 - Unofficial OpenCV binding for D

    • Games

  • Backgammonystars32 - A Backgammon GUI for Linux built with Gtk.
  • Atriumstars100 - FPS game with physics based puzzles using OpenGL.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
People

  • Átila Neves - Deputy Leader of D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Command Line

  • lunetastars49 - A command-line fuzzy finder.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Articles

  • Hidden treasures in the D standard library - An article talking about several useful functions and templates in Phobos.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • dlang-requestsstars127 - HTTP client library inspired by python-requests

    • Dev Tools

  • D-Scannerstars222 - Swiss-army knife for D source code (linting, static analysis, D code parsing, etc.)
  • dfmtstars170 - formatter for D source code

    • IDEs & Editors

  • Dutylstars80 - Vim plugin that integrates various D development tools

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
End-user applications

  • Drillstars227 - Search files without indexing, but clever crawling

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Apr 8th - Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:
Organizations

  • HuntLabs - A technology group using DLang. Have pure D language implementation of quickly develop server-side applications and build distributed system services.

    • Basic

  • huntstars79 - A refined core library for D programming language. The module has concurrency / collection / event / io / logging / text / serialize and more.
  • hunt-timestars2 - A time library and similar to Joda-time and Java.time api.
  • hunt-validationstars2 - A data validation library for DLang based on hunt library.

    • Web Frameworks

  • hunt-netstars19 - High-performance network library for D programming language, event-driven asynchonous implemention(IOCP / kqueue / epoll).
  • hunt-httpstars23 - HTTP/1 and HTTP/2 protocol library for D.
  • hunt-stompstars0 - STOMP for websocket protocol library implement in D.

    • Database clients

  • hunt-entitystars53 - Hunt entity is an object-relational mapping tool for the D programming language. Referring to the design idea of JPA, support PostgreSQL / MySQL / SQLite.
  • hunt-databasestars44 - Hunt database abstraction layer for D programing language, support PostgreSQL / MySQL / SQLite.

    • Command Line

  • hunt-consolestars4 - Hunt console creation easier to create powerful command-line applications.

    • Text Processing

  • hunt-markdownstars12 - A markdown parsing and rendering library for D programming language. Support commonMark.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Game Frameworks

  • PolyplexEnginestars30 - libpp is an XNA like framework written in D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Text Processing

  • eBay's TSV utilitiesstars1.2k - Filtering, statistics, sampling, joins and other operations on TSV files. Very fast, especially good for large datasets.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 9th - Jul 15th, 2018
item.description:
Command Line

  • dargstars34 - Robust command line argument parsing for D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Apr 2nd - Apr 8th, 2018
item.description:
Blogs

  • /r/d_language on Reddit - A feed of news and blog posts about D.

    • Getting Help

  • Official D Forum Learn Group - Highest traffic site for answering D questions.
  • D on Stack Overflow - Less traffic than forums but possibly easier to search.
  • D on Rosetta Code - Examples of how to do many basic things in D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Feb 19th - Feb 25th, 2018
item.description:
Official Website

  • blog.dlang.org - Official blog.

    • Blogs

  • blog.dlang.org - Official blog.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jan 8th - Jan 14th, 2018
item.description:
People

  • YOU - Please add your information if you've done something interesting in D. It is you, the awesome people that made D awesome.

    • Scientific

  • decimalsstars17 - Decimal library for D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Dec 25th - Dec 31st, 2017
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • colliestars60 - An asynchronous event-driven network framework written in dlang, like netty framework in D.

    • Data serialization

    Binary Serilization

  • flatbuffersstars12 - D Programming Language implementation of the google flatbuffers library.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
Tutorials

  • The Dlang Tour - An interactive tutorial for D, inspired by Golang Tour.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
Video applications

  • DerelictGL3stars78 - A dynamic binding to OpenGL for the D Programming Language.

    • Parallel computing

  • DComputestars107 - GPGPU with Native D for OpenCL and CUDA
  • DerelictCUDAstars18 - Dynamic bindings to the CUDA library for the D Programming Language.
  • DerelictCLstars7 - Dynamic bindings to the OpenCL library for the D Programming Language.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Organizations

  • sociomantic labs - Berlin based company specializing in real-time bidding for online advertising. Main sponsor of the annual D language conference. Has open-sourced large parts of their codebase as part of the tsunami organization.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
IDEs & Editors

  • DDT - Eclipse plugin for the D programming language.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Aug 21st - Aug 27th, 2017
item.description:
OS

  • XOmBstars328 - An exokernel operating system written in D

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Aug 14th - Aug 20th, 2017
item.description:
Scientific

  • mirstars205 - Sandbox for some mir packages: sparse tensors, Hoffman and others.
  • mir-algorithmstars205 - N-dimensional arrays (matrixes, tensors), algorithms, general purpose library.
  • mir-randomstars30 - Advanced Random Number Generators.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 31st - Aug 6th, 2017
item.description:
Machine Learning

  • vectorflowstars1.1k - Nexflix's opensource deep learning framework.

    • Command Line

  • argsdstars8 - A command line and config file parser for DLang

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Command Line

  • tilixstars4.5k - A tiling terminal emulator for Linux using GTK+ 3.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Game Frameworks

  • Voxelmanstars105 - Plugin-based client-server voxel game engine written in D language

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Official Website

  • Github Organization - Official GitHub organization for D. Repo for all official D tools & code.

    • Organizations

  • D Programming Language - Official Organization, hosts DMD, Phobos and other official tools and libs.

    • Package Management

  • dubstars548 - Official package and build management system for D.

    • Compilers

  • dmdstars2.4k - The reference compiler for the D programming language. Stable, builds insanely fast, very good for learning and rapid prototyping/development. Currently the frontend is implemented in D, and shared between dmd, ldc and gdc, the backend is implemented in C++.

    • Build Tools

  • dubstars548 - De facto official package and build management system for D. Will be included officially soon.

    • IDEs & Editors

  • Visual Dstars257 - Visual Studio extension for the D programming language.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
GUI Libs

  • LibUIstars35 - Dynamic Binding for libuistars9.9k

    • Image Processing

  • dlib.imagestars181 - image processing (8 and 16 bits per channel, floating point operations, filtering, FFT, HDRI, graphics formats support including JPEG and PNG)
  • color.d + bmp.d, jpg.d, png.d - basic color struct, HSL functions and reading and writing image files

    • Configuration

  • inifile-Dstars22 - A compile time ini file parser and writter generator for D

    • Logging

  • std.experimenatal.logger - Phobos's upcoming standard logging facility

    • Build Tools

  • cook2stars22 - Fast incremental build tool intended for projects in D
  • premakestars2 - Premake has built-in support for D projects
  • reggaestars146 - meta build system in D
  • Makefilestars19 - Makefile template for D projects
  • cmake-dstars51 - CMake D Projects

    • Articles

  • D Functional Garden

    • Data serialization

    XML

  • orangestars71 - General purpose serializer (currently only supports XML)
  • std.experimental.xmlstars22 - Phobos candidate for a XML serialization

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Organizations

  • libmir - D's numeric library development team

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2016
item.description:
Command Line

  • dexpectstars12 - A D implementation of the expect framework. Handy for bash emulation.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Feb 29th - Mar 6th, 2016
item.description:
Command Line

  • Argonstars14 - A processor for command-line arguments, an alternative to Getopt, written in D.

    • Database clients

  • Tiny Redis - Redis driver for D. Fast, Simple, Stable. Has no dependencies.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
Game Frameworks

  • DAllegro5 - D binding/wrapper to Allegro 5, a modern game programming library.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2016
item.description:
Data serialization

Binary Serilization

  • cerealedstars85 - Serialisation library for D
  • dprotostars35 - Google Protocol Buffer support in D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
GUI Libs

  • DWTstars127 - A library for creating cross-platform GUI applications. GWT is a port of the Java SWT library to D. DWT was promoted as a semi-standard GUI library for D, but unfortunately didn't catch up popularity yet.
  • dqmlstars32 - Qt Qml bindings for the D programming language.
  • DLangUIstars640 - Cross Platform GUI for D programming language. My personal favorate, because it is written in D(not a binding), and is cross platform. DLangUI also has a good showcase in the IDE DLangIDEstars360.

    • Games

  • Dtanksstars11 - Robot Tank Battle Game.

    • Organizations

  • LDC Developers - LDC releated projects.
  • DerelictOrg - A GitHub organization hosting all Derelict bindings including OpenGL and other multimedia/game related library bindings. (OpenGL 3, Bgfx, ENet, SDL 2, GLFW 3，OpenGLES, Free Image, Assimp3, libtheora, libogg, libvorbis, SFML 2, libpq, PhysicsFS, Open Dynamics Engine, Lua, DevIL, OpenAL, ALURE).

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Organizations

  • DlangScience -A focal point and first port of call for scientific libraries and tooling for D.

    • Scientific

  • scidstars83 - Scientific library for the D programming language
  • dstatsstars21 - A statistics library for D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Organizations

  • infognition - Infognition is a self-funded and self-sustained company specializing in video processing and compression technologies for end-users and developers. They provide several opensource video related applications & tools written in D, hosted on bitbucket. They are also porting their main product--Video Enchanser from C/C++ to D.

    • Lexers, Parsers, Parser Generators

  • ctpgstars43 - Compile-Time Parser (with converter) Generator written in D.

    • Preprocesors

  • warpstars497 - A fast preprocessor for C and C++ used in Facebook infrastructure. Written by Walter Bright.

    • Database clients

  • mysql-nativestars73 - A MySQL client implemented in native D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2015
item.description:
Data serialization

JSON

  • fast.jsonstars108 - A library for D that aims to provide the fastest possible implementation of some every day routines.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Javascript

  • higgsstars830 - Higgs JavaScript Virtual Machine, implemented in D.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2015
item.description:
Game Frameworks

  • DSFMLstars95 - A static binding of SFML in a way that makes sense for D. see http://dsfml.com/.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2015
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • libasyncstars137 - Cross-platform event loop library of asynchronous objects
  • libhttp2stars34 - HTTP/2 library in D, translated from nghttp2

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2015
item.description:
Data serialization

JSON

  • painlessjsonstars20 - Convert between D types and std.json.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jan 19th - Jan 25th, 2015
item.description:
IDEs & Editors

  • Dlang IDEstars360 - D language IDE based on DlangUIstars640. This is a pure D implementation.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Dec 15th - Dec 21st, 2014
item.description:
Articles

  • Porting D Runtime to ARM - A study about porting a minimal D runtime to ARM Cortex-M preprocessors.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Aug 4th - Aug 10th, 2014
item.description:
Command Line

  • terminal.d - Part of Adam Ruppe's arsdstars430 library supporting cursor and color manipulation on the console.

    • Image Processing

  • ArmageddonEngine - Vladimir Panteleev's ae library has a package for image processing in functional style, which is described in the article Functional Image Processing in D.
  • Blogsort - A simple Windows app for viewing photos and preparing them for a blog.

    • Configuration

  • sdlangstars91 - An SDL (Simple Declarative Language) library for D.

    • Organizations

  • EMSI - A Career building company that uses D as their main language. Hosts their opensource projects.
  • d-gamedev-team - An organization of gamedev related repos, including a D gamedev toolkit called gfmstars194 and an opengl tutorial in Dstars63.

    • Game Frameworks

  • gfmstars194 - D gamedev toolkit. see http://d-gamedev-team.github.io/gfm/.
  • DGamestars83 - A 2D framework for the D programming Language. see http://dgame-dev.de/.

    • Tutorials

  • OpenGL tutorialsstars63 - OpenGL tutorials in D.

    • Games

  • Spacecraftstars16 - A 3d multiplayer deathmatch space game written in D 2.0.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 28th - Aug 3rd, 2014
item.description:
Tutorials

  • D Template Tutorialstars208 - A tutorial dedicated to D Templates. Very good explanation about templates. Has pdf version. by Philippe Sigaud.

    • Blogs

  • Planet D - A repository of co-authored D-specific blogs maintained by Vladimir Panteleev.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 21st - Jul 27th, 2014
item.description:
Organizations

  • Circular Studios - We are a group of game developers at Rochester Institute of Technology building games and game tech. Hosts Dashstars410, a 3D game engine written in D, and other related libs.

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 14th - Jul 20th, 2014
item.description:
Official Website

  • Issue tracking - Official issue tracking/reporting system for D. If you find bugs in the D compiler and/or libraries, please come and report them!

    • Compilers

  • ldcstars950 - The LLVM-based D compiler. Uses the DMD frontend and LLVM backend. Builds slower than dmd, but generates more optimized code than DMD. It supports all the target platforms of LLVM.
  • gdcstars359 - GNU D Compiler. Use DMD frontend and GCC backend. Currently targets the most platforms due to the use of GCC. Generated code runs faster than DMD in most cases, on par with LDC. In the process of integration with the official GCC toolchain.

    • Lexers, Parsers, Parser Generators

  • Mono-D's DParserstars27 - A D parser written in C# and used in Mono-D.
  • Peggedstars471 - A Parsing Expression Grammar (PEG) module written in D.
  • dunnartstars13 - LALR(1) Parser Generator written in D.

    • Database clients

  • ddbstars40 - Database access for D2. Currently only supports PostgreSQL.
  • arsdstars430 - Adam D. Ruppe's library; in addition to a Web backend, it also has support for database access with database.d, sqlite.d, mysql.d and postgres.d.
  • ddbcstars63 - DDBC is a DB Connector for D language (similar to JDBC). HibernateD (see below) uses ddbc for database abstraction.
  • hibernatedstars79 - HibernateD is an ORM for D (similar to Hibernate).
  • dvormstars18 - An ORM for D with Vibe support. Works with vibe.d and mysql-d, giving it the ability to access MongoDB and MySQL.

    • GUI Libs

  • GtkDstars294 - GtkD is a D binding and OO wrapper of GTK+. GtkD is actively maintained and is currently the most stable GUI lib for D.
  • tkDstars104 - GUI toolkit for the D programming language based on Tcl/Tk.

    • Game Bindings

  • DerelictOrg - A GitHub organization hosting all Derelict bindings including:
    • OpenGL 3 (DerelictGL3),
    • Bgfx (DerelictBgfx),
    • ENet (DerelictENet),
    • SDL 2 (DerelictSDL2),
    • GLFW 3 (DerelictGLFW3),
    • OpenGLES (DerelictGLES),
    • Free Image (DerelictFI),
    • Assimp3 (DerelictASSIMP3),
    • libtheora (DerelictTheora),
    • libogg (DerelictOgg),
    • libvorbis (DerelictVorbis),
    • SFML 2 (DerelictSFML2),
    • libpq (DerelictPQ),
    • PhysicsFS (DerelictPHYSFS),
    • Open Dynamics Engine (DerelictODE),
    • Lua (DerelictLua),
    • DevIL (DerelictIL),
    • OpenAL (DerelictAL),
    • ALURE (DerelictALURE).

item.title: dlang-community/awesome-d Jul 7th - Jul 13th, 2014
item.description:
Command Line

  • scriptlikestars85 - Utility library to aid writing script-like programs in D.
  • tododstars14 - Todod is a command line based todo list manager. It also has support for shell interaction based on linenoisestars2.7k.

    • Lexers, Parsers, Parser Generators

  • Martin Nowak's Lexerstars10 - A lexer generator.
  • Goldie - Goldie Parsing System.

    • Compilers

  • dil - A compiler for the D programming language. Written in D.
